summary: Iter19 frontend testing PASSED — Pre-Auction card Actions column with 4 icon buttons per row fully functional. All 20 assertions verified: headers, counts, conditional Move-to-Auction rendering, WhatsApp/PDF/Reactivate wiring, confirm dialog, layout at 1600 & 1366 (EN+TET), and full end-to-end move-to-auction flow.

whatsapp_flow.toast_shown: 'WhatsApp (mocked — set token in Settings)' — MOCKED as expected (Meta creds not set)

reactivate_flow.dialog_opens: PASS — role='dialog' visible on pa-reactivate click

move_to_auction_flow.row_appears_in_auctions_module: PASS — verified visually: CT-2026-0115 shown at top of Leilaun/Auctions table with status='listed'

critical_code_review_comments: Move-to-Auction uses native window.confirm() — acceptable per spec, but for consistency with rest of app (which uses shadcn AlertDialog elsewhere) consider switching to a styled confirmation dialog in future iteration.
Dialog accessibility warning in console: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}' on the reactivate dialog — minor a11y issue, existing (not introduced by iter19).
seed_data_creation: None. Test mutation: contract CT-2026-0115 (id=15abbc3e-03c5-4ba9-8a40-e8f5143f388a) was moved from Pre-Auction to Auctions during end-to-end verification of pa-auction click. This reduces auction_ready count from 4 to 3. Main agent may re-run seed/simulation or manually revert if needed for further testing.
mocked_apis_confirmed: WhatsApp send returned 'mocked — set token in Settings' toast (Meta creds not configured — acceptable per spec)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter19 fully verified. One test mutation: CT-2026-0115 was moved to Auctions during testing (now listed there). If subsequent tests need 4 auction_ready contracts, re-seed or aging simulation may be required. All pa-* selectors work as specified: pa-whatsapp-{id}, pa-reactivate-{id}, pa-pdf-{id} on every row; pa-auction-{id} ONLY on auction_ready rows. Backend endpoints /api/whatsapp/send, /api/contracts/{id}/reactivate, /api/auctions/move, /api/contracts/{id}/pdf all responsive (200).
